merged_groups.name: Group 4: README polish + final cleanup + remaining edge cases

merged_groups.name: Group 5: method navigation/filter polish and result-panel UX improvements
merged_groups.notes: Merged via PR #5 after clean review on latest commit. Included method count badges, write/danger filters, empty-output fallback, retry button for failed calls. All 52 tests + build pass on 2026-04-24.

merged_groups.name: Group 6: form UX polish and navigation refinements
merged_groups.notes: Merged via PR #6. Included invalid-address blocking, clear-form error reset, chain metadata tooltip, deterministic API key helper, and passing 60-test suite + build on 2026-04-24.

merged_groups.name: Group 7: real agent-backed dapp/page generation pipeline
merged_groups.notes: Merged via PR #7. Backend now invokes hermes-agent after deterministic ABI analysis, safely merges generated page output, and preserves deterministic method/risk boundaries. All 62 tests and npm run build passed on 2026-04-24.
